}

function getSnapPosition (mat, position)
  basic_position = deck_position[position]
  scale = mat.getScale()
  scaleFactor = scale.z / scale.x

  return {basic_position[1] * scaleFactor, basic_position[2], basic_position[3]}
end

card_rotations = {
  up = {0,0,0},
  right = {0,90,0},
  down = {0,180,0},
  left = {0,270,0}
}

function setMatSnapPoints(mat, scaleFactor)
  local inverseScale = 1 / (scaleFactor or 1)
  local snap_points = {
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "material"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "banished"),
      rotation = card_rotations["left"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "main"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "graveyard"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    }
  }

  local memory_start = -0.975 * inverseScale
  local memory_offset = 0.150 * inverseScale
  local memory_count = 14

  for memory_index = 0, memory_count - 1 do
    local memory_snap_point = {
      position = {
        memory_start + (memory_index * memory_offset),
        0,
        memory_row_z
      },
      rotation = {0, 0, 0},
      rotation_snap = true
    }
    table.insert(snap_points, memory_snap_point)
  end

  mat.setSnapPoints(snap_points)
  mat.interactable = false
end

function glimpseQuickAction(player, value, index)
  glimpse1(player.color)
end

function glimpse1(playerColor)
  -- Find the player’s main deck
  local deck = findPlayerDeckByName(playerColor, "main")
  if not deck then return end

  -- 1) Take the top card (index=0) off the deck,
  --    dropping it just above the deck so it spawns in view
  local spawnPos = deck.getPosition() + Vector(0, 2, 0)
  local card = deck.takeObject({
    index    = 0,
    position = spawnPos,
    smooth   = false
  })

  if card then
    Wait.condition(function()
      -- send it to the player’s hand (hand #2 here),
      -- then register it with the Encoder
      card.deal(1, playerColor, 2)
      Encoder.call("APIencodeObject", { obj = card })
      Encoder.call("APIobjEnableProp", { obj = card, propID = "πGlimpse" })

    end, function()
      return not card.spawning
    end)
  end
end

function isFourPlayerMode()
    local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
    if not redMat then return true end
    local posX = redMat.getPosition().x
    return posX < -10
end

function isStillSwitching()
  local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
  if not redMat then return true end
  return redMat.isSmoothMoving()
end

function toggleBigMat(player, value, index)
    local mat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    if not mat then return end

    local handzone = getObjectFromGUID(playerhandzones[player.color])
    if not handzone then return end

    local currentScale = mat.getScale().x
    local newScale = 22 - currentScale
    mat.setScale({newScale, 1, newScale})

    local pos = handzone.getPosition()
    pos.z = (pos.z > 0) and 57-pos.z or -57-pos.z
    handzone.setPosition(pos)
end

function togglePlayerCount()

    if isStillSwitching() then
      print ("Wait for switching to finish first!")
      return

    local moveDistance = -20
    local hideDistance = -200
    shouldLock = false

    if isFourPlayerMode() then
      moveDistance = 20
      hideDistance = 200
      shouldLock = true
    end

    print("[INFO] Switching between 2p/4p mode")

    moveObjectX(playmats.Red,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmats.Blue,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(lifecounters.redLarge,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.redSmall,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.blueLarge,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounters.blueSmall,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(playerfields.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Blue, moveDistance)

        --moveObjectX(bagGUID, moveDistance)
    end

    setObjectLock(lifecounters.greenSmall, shouldLock)
    setObjectLock(lifecounters.purpleLarge, shouldLock)

    moveObjectX(lifecounters.greenLarge, hideDistance)

    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Purple, hideDistance)
end

function moveObjectX(guid, deltaX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = pos.x + deltaX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos)
end

function moveObjectToX(guid, targetX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = targetX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos)
end

function setObjectLock(guid, locked)
  local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
  obj.setLock(locked)
end

function toggleVisibility(player, id)
  visibility = Global.UI.getAttribute(id, "visibility")
  visible = visibility:find(player.color) ~= nil
  if visible then
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "visibility", visibility:gsub("|" .. player.color, ""))

target_playmat_width = 35.6

function setPlaymatImage(player, imageUrl)
    local player_color = player.color
    local guid = playmats[player_color]
    local originalObj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not originalObj then
        print("No playmat found for color: " .. player_color)
        return
    end

    if imageUrl=="" then
      return
    end

    -- Update the image
    local custom = originalObj.getCustomObject()
    custom.image = imageUrl
    originalObj.setCustomObject(custom)
    originalObj.reload()

    -- Wait a bit for reload, then re-fetch by GUID
    Wait.time(function()

            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if not obj then
                print("Waiting for object to reload...")
                return false  -- Try again
            end

            local bounds = obj.getBounds().size
            local actualWidth = bounds.x
            if actualWidth == 0 then
                print("Bounds not ready yet...")
                return false  -- Try again
            end

            -- Rescale X to match target width
            local currentScale = obj.getScale()
            local scaleFactor = target_playmat_width / actualWidth
            obj.setScale({
                x = currentScale.x * scaleFactor,
                y = currentScale.y,
                z = currentScale.z
            })

            setMatSnapPoints(obj, scaleFactor)
            return true  -- Done
    end, 0.5)
end

-- Simple trimming of leading/trailing spaces
local function trimSpaces(str)
    if str == nil then
      return ""
    end
    return str:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
end

local function randomGUID()
    local chars = '0123456789abcdef'
    local res = {}
    for i=1,6 do
        local rand = math.random(#chars)
        res[#res+1] = chars:sub(rand, rand)
    end
    return table.concat(res)
end

extraDecks = {
    references = {},
    token = {},
    generated = {},
    mastery = {}
}
shouldSpawnExtraDecks=false

function spawnDeck(name, cards, player, as_bag)
    if name == "references" or name == "token" or name == "generated" or name == "mastery" then
        for _, card in ipairs(cards) do
            table.insert(extraDecks[name], card)
            shouldSpawnExtraDecks=true
        end
        return -- Delay spawning until all are gathered
    end

    if name == "extra" then
        local combined = {}
        for _, group in pairs(extraDecks) do
            for _, card in ipairs(group) do
                table.insert(combined, card)
            end
        end
        cards = combined
    end

    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    local rotation = playmat.getRotation()
    local position = playmat.positionToWorld(getSnapPosition(playmat, name))
    local bounds = playmat.getBounds()

    local deck = getDeck(name, cards, player)
    if as_bag or name == "extra" then
        deck = getDeckBag(name, deck, player)
    end

    deck.Transform = deck.Transform or {}
    deck.Transform.posX = position.x
    deck.Transform.posY = playmat.getPosition().y + bounds.size.y + bounds.offset.y + 1
    deck.Transform.posZ = position.z
    deck.Transform.rotY = rotation.y

    return spawnObjectData({data = deck})
end

function tableContains(table, value)
  for i = 1,#table do
    if (table[i]:lower() == value) then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

function getDeck(name, cards, player)
    global_offset = (global_offset % 30) + 1

    local main_sleeves = getSleeves(player)
    local material_sleeves = getMaterialDeckSleeves(player)
    local sleeve = material_sleeves
    if name == "main" then
      sleeve = main_sleeves
    end


    local deckOffset = global_offset * 1000

    local deck_ids       = {}
    local custom_deck    = {}
    local contained_objs = {}

    local idx = 1
    for _, card in ipairs(cards) do
        local cardstomake = (card.quantity == 0 and 1) or (card.quantity or 1)

        for i = 1, cardstomake do
            local orientation = (card.orientation or ""):lower()
            local frontSide, backSide = nil, nil
            local hasOrientations = (type(card.orientations) == "table" and #card.orientations > 0)
            local isMultiState = false

            if hasOrientations then
                isMultiState = true
                local oppositeNeeded = (orientation == "front") and "back"
                    or (orientation == "back") and "front"
                    or nil

                if oppositeNeeded then
                    for b, alt in ipairs(card.orientations) do
                        if (alt.orientation==nil) or (type(alt.orientation) == "string"
                          and alt.orientation:lower() == oppositeNeeded) then
                            backSide = alt
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end

            local hasTypes = (type(card.types) == "table" and #(card.types) > 0)
            if hasTypes then
              if tableContains(card.types, "regalia") or tableContains(card.types, "champion") then
                sleeve = material_sleeves
              else
                sleeve = main_sleeves
              end
            end

            if orientation == "front" and backSide then
                frontSide = card

            elseif orientation == "back" and backSide then
                -- the user put the back side in their deck so we'll just flip it for them
                frontSide = backSide
                backSide  = card
            end

            if isMultiState then
                local frontKey    = (deckOffset + idx)
                local backKey     = frontKey + 1
                local frontBackKey= backKey + 1
                local frontID     = frontKey * 100
                local backID      = backKey * 100
                local frontBackID = frontBackKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, frontID)


                local frontURL = frontSide.image or card_back
                local backURL  = backSide.image  or card_back

                -- This section is to work around a bug in TTS
                local altBackURL

                if backURL:find("shoutatyourdecks.com/images/") then
                    altBackURL = backURL:gsub("https://[^/]+/images/", "https://api.gatcg.com/cards/images/")
                elseif backURL:find("api.gatcg.com/cards/images/") then
                    altBackURL = backURL:gsub("https://api.gatcg.com/cards/images/", "https://shoutatyourdecks.com/images/")
                else
                    altBackURL = backURL
                end

                custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }
                custom_deck[tostring(backKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = altBackURL,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }
                custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL,
                    BackURL      = backURL,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = false,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    Nickname = frontSide.name or "(NoName)",
                    CardID   = frontID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(frontKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)]
                    },
                    States = {
                        ["2"] = {
                            GUID = randomGUID(),
                            Name = "CardCustom",
                            Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                            Nickname = backSide.name or "(NoName)",
                            CardID   = backID,
                            HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                            CustomDeck = {
                                [tostring(backKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(backKey)]
                            }
                        },
                        ["3"] = {
                            GUID = randomGUID(),
                            Name = "CardCustom",
                            Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                            Nickname = frontSide.name .. " / " .. backSide.name or "(NoName)",
                            CardID   = frontBackID,
                            HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                            CustomDeck = {
                                [tostring(frontBackKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)]
                            }
                        }
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 3
            else
                local singleKey = deckOffset + idx
                local singleID  = singleKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, singleID)

                local faceUrl = card.image or card_back

                custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = faceUrl,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    Nickname = card.name,
                    CardID   = singleID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(singleKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)]
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 1
            end
        end
    end

    if #contained_objs == 1 then
        contained_objs[1].Transform.rotZ = 180
        return contained_objs[1]
    else
        return {
            GUID = randomGUID(),
            Name = "Deck",
            Transform = {
                rotX = 360, rotY = 180, rotZ = 180,
                scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale
            },
            Nickname = name,
            DeckIDs = deck_ids,
            CustomDeck = custom_deck,
            ContainedObjects = contained_objs
        }

end

function importDeck(player, value, index)
    local deck_text = ui_decklist_state[player.color]
    deck_text = trimSpaces(deck_text)

    if deck_text == "" then
        broadcastToColor("No Decklist URL provided!", player.color, {255,0,0})
        return
    end

    if deck_text:match("^https?://") then
        importDeckFromURL(deck_text, player, value, index)
        return
    end

    if deck_text:match("^{") then
      local json = JSON.decode(deck_text)
      if json then
          if json.error == nil then
              SpawnDeckFromJson(json, player, value, index)
              return
          end
      end
    end

    broadcastToColor("Invalid deck input! Provide a valid JSON decklist or a URL.", player.color, {255,0,0})
end

function importDeckFromURL(deck_url, player, value, index)

  if deck_url ~= nil and deck_url:len() > 0 then
    if deck_url:sub(1, 5) ~= "https" then
      deck_url = "https://" .. deck_url
    end
    -- Silvie
    if deck_url:find("silvie.org") ~= nil or deck_url:find("silv.ie") then
        if deck_url:find("format=json") == nil then
            if deck_url:find("?") == nil then
              deck_url = deck_url .. "?format=json"
            else
              deck_url = deck_url .. "&format=json"
            end
        end
    elseif deck_url:find("shoutatyourdecks.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("/decks/", "/api/")
    elseif deck_url:find("silvie.gg") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("silvie.gg/decklist%?deck=", "build.silvie.gg/deck/")
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("silvie.gg/decklist/", "build.silvie.gg/deck/")
    elseif deck_url:find("jsonblob.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("jsonblob.com/", "jsonblob.com/api/jsonBlob/")
    elseif deck_url:find("tcgarchitect.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("tcgarchitect.com/grand%-archive/decks/", "api.tcgarchitect.com/tts/grand-archive/deck/")
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("tcgarchitect.com/grand%-archive/tournaments/decklists/", "api.tcgarchitect.com/tts/grand-archive/tournament-deck/")
    elseif deck_url:find("fractalofin.site") ~= nil then
        local event_id, player_id,suffix

        local patterns = {
            { pattern = "/player/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)", swap = true, suffix=""  }, -- player page
            { pattern = "#deck_(%d+)_(%d+)",             swap = false, suffix="" }, -- card/archetype page
            { pattern = "/%w+/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)_topcut",    swap = false, suffix="_topcut" },  -- event page
            { pattern = "/%w+/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)",    swap = false, suffix="" },  -- event page
        }

        for _, entry in ipairs(patterns) do
            local first, second = deck_url:match(entry.pattern)
            if first and second then
                player_id = entry.swap and tonumber(first) or tonumber(second)
                event_id = entry.swap and tonumber(second) or tonumber(first)
                suffix = entry.suffix
                break
            end
        end

        if event_id and player_id then
            deck_url = "https://fractalofin.site/tts/event_" .. event_id .. "/" .. player_id .. suffix .. ".json"
        else
            broadcastToColor("Invalid Fractalofin URL format!", player.color, {255,0,0})
            return
        end
    else
        broadcastToColor("Invalid Decklist URL!", player.color, {255,0,0})
        return
    end

    WebRequest.get(deck_url, function(req)
      if req.is_error then
        log(request.error)
      else
        json = JSON.decode(req.text)
        if json.error ~= nil then
          log(json.error)
          if json.error == "silvie/bad-request" then
            broadcastToColor("Invalid Silvie.org Decklist!", player.color, {255,0,0})
          else
            broadcastToColor("Unknown Error :(", player.color, {255,0,0})
          end
        else
          -- Generate Cards
          for deck, cards in pairs(json.cards) do
            if #cards > 0 then
              local obj = spawnDeck(deck, cards, player, index=="import_deck_bag")
              -- temporarily disabled
              if obj and deck:lower() == "main" then
                local markerGUID = notshuffledmarkers[player.color]
                local marker = getObjectFromGUID(markerGUID)
                if marker then
                  local playmatGUID = playmats[player.color]
                  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmatGUID)

                  if playmat then
                    local rot = playmat.getRotation()
                    marker.setRotation(rot)
                    if(rot.y>90) then
                      marker.setPosition(obj.getPosition() + Vector(6, 0, 0))
                    else
                      marker.setPosition(obj.getPosition() + Vector(-6, 0, 0))
                    end
                  end

                  marker.setName("Not Shuffled Marker")
                  marker.setVar("ownerColor", player.color)
                end
              end
            end
          end
          if shouldSpawnExtraDecks then
            spawnDeck("extra", {}, player, true)
          end
          extraDecks = {
              references = {},
              token = {},
              generated = {},
              mastery = {}
          }
          shouldSpawnExtraDecks=false
          local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player.color, "main")
          deckcounts[player.color][2] = math.max(60, #mainDeck.getObjects())
          deleteBoardedCopies(player.color)
          createBoardedCopies(player.color)
          toggleImportLayout(player)
        end
      end
    end)
  end
end

function findPlayerZoneByName(player_color, name_fragment)

  if not playmat then return end

  local snap_offset = getSnapPosition(playmat, name_fragment:lower())

  return targetPos

function findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, name_fragment)
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
    if not playmat then return end

    local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds(player_color)

    -- Try first by name matching
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        local pos = obj.getPosition()
        if obj.tag == "Deck"
        and obj.getName():lower():find(name_fragment:lower())
        and isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
            return obj
        end
    end

    -- If no deck with matching name, fallback to position check

    local snap_offset = getSnapPosition(playmat, name_fragment:lower())
    if not snap_offset then return nil end  -- unknown type

    local targetPos = playmat.positionToWorld(snap_offset)

    -- Find closest deck to the expected snap point
    local bestDeck = nil
    local bestDist = 1 -- usually like 0.3ish

    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local dist = (obj.getPosition() - targetPos):magnitude()
            if dist < bestDist then
                bestDeck = obj
                bestDist = dist
            end
        end
    end

    return bestDeck
end

function sideboardingSnapshotForContainer(container)
    if not container or container.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

    for _, color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
        local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(color, "main")
        local matDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(color, "material")

        if container == mainDeck or container == matDeck then
            local mainSize = mainDeck and #mainDeck.getObjects() or 0
            local matSize = matDeck and #matDeck.getObjects() or 0

            if mainSize >= deckcounts[color][2] and matSize == deckcounts[color][1] then
                deleteBoardedCopies(color)
                createBoardedCopies(color)
                log("Updating Sideboard state for player ".. color)
            end

            break
        end
    end

function performResetFlourish(player, deck, sleeve_url)
    if not deck or deck.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

    local count = #deck.getObjects()
    if count < 3 then return end

    local center = deck.getPosition()
    local radius = 5
    local fixedCount = 12
    local angleStep = (2 * math.pi) / fixedCount

    local total = math.min(count, 30)
    local cardsToAnimate = total - 2
    local animDuration = 0.5
    local delayPerCard = animDuration / cardsToAnimate

    for i = 1, cardsToAnimate do
        local angle = angleStep * i
        local offset = Vector(math.cos(angle) * radius, 2, math.sin(angle) * radius)
        local delay = (i - 1) * delayPerCard

        Wait.time(function()
            local ghost = spawnObject({
                type = "Card",
                position = center + offset,
                rotation = {0, 0, 180},
                scale = {0.95, 0.95, 0.95},
                sound = false

            })

            if ghost then
                ghost.setCustomObject({
                  face = sleeve_url,
                  back = sleeve_url
                })

                ghost.setLock(true)
                ghost.setName("Flourish")
                ghost.setDescription("")

                Wait.time(function()
                    ghost.setPositionSmooth(center + Vector(0, 2 + i * 0.1, 0), false, true)
                end, 0.2)

                Wait.time(function()
                    if ghost then ghost.destruct() end
                end, 1.0)
            end
        end, delay)
    end
end

function getBoundsOfDeckZone (player_color, zoneName)
  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
  local localPos = getSnapPosition(playmat, zoneName)

  if playmat and localPos then

      local worldPos = playmat.positionToWorld(localPos)

      local halfSizeX = 2.0
      local halfSizeY = 2.0
      local halfSizeZ = 2.0

      local minBound = Vector(worldPos.x - halfSizeX, worldPos.y - halfSizeY, worldPos.z - halfSizeZ)
      local maxBound = Vector(worldPos.x + halfSizeX, worldPos.y + halfSizeY, worldPos.z + halfSizeZ)

      return minBound, maxBound

  end
end

function clearSideboardAndExtra(player, value, index)
  local additional_zones_to_clear = {

  }
  for _, zoneName in ipairs(additional_zones_to_clear) do
      local minBound, maxBound = getBoundsOfDeckZone( player.color, zoneName )
      if minBound then
        destroyEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)
      end
  end
end

function destroyEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)
  -- Iterate through all objects and delete only cards, dice, and tokens
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do

      local pos = obj.getPosition()
      local tag = obj.tag

      -- Check if the object is inside the playmat's area
      if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
          -- Delete only specific object types
          if tag == "Card" or tag == "Dice" or tag == "Chip" or tag == "Infinite" or tag == "Token" or tag == "Deck" then
              obj.destroy()
          end
      end
  end
end

function getPlaymatBounds(color)
  local mat    = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[color])
  local b, c   = mat.getBounds(), mat.getPosition()
  local hx, hy, hz = b.size.x/2, 50, b.size.z/2
  return Vector(c.x - hx, c.y - hy, c.z - hz), Vector(c.x + hx, c.y + hy, c.z + hz)
end

function wakeUpEverythingOnPlaymat(player, value, index)
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    if not playmat then return end

    local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds (player.color)
    local minBoundBanish, maxBoundBanish = getBoundsOfDeckZone (player.color, "banished")

    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" or obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local pos = obj.getPosition()

            if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) and not isPointInBounds(pos, minBoundBanish, maxBoundBanish) then

                local rot = obj.getRotation()
                local isFaceDown = rot.z > 90 and rot.z < 270

                local newRot = {
                    x = playmat.getRotation().x,
                    y = playmat.getRotation().y,
                    z = isFaceDown and 180 or 0
                }

                obj.setRotationSmooth(newRot)
            end
        end
    end
end

function isPointInBounds(point, minBound, maxBound)

  return point.x >= minBound.x and point.x <= maxBound.x and
     point.y >= minBound.y and point.y <= maxBound.y and
     point.z >= minBound.z and point.z <= maxBound.z
end

function reserveIntoMemory(player, value, index)
    local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
    local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)
    if not memoryZone then
        log("Memory Zone for player " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    local handGuid = playerhandzones[player.color]
    local handZone = getObjectFromGUID(handGuid)
    if not handZone then
        log("Hand Zone for player " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    -- Find how many cards are already in the memory zone
    local memPos = memoryZone.getPosition()
    local memObjects = memoryZone.getObjects()
    local existingCount = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(memObjects) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" then
            existingCount = existingCount + 1
        end
    end

    local spacing = -3.2
    local initial = 9.5
    local cardsToMove = {}

    if (memPos.z <0) then
      spacing = spacing * -1
      initial = initial * -1
    end


    local handObjects = handZone.getObjects()
    if handObjects then
        for _, item in ipairs(handObjects) do
            if item.tag == "Card" then
                local rot = item.getRotation()
                if math.abs(item.getRotation().z) > 90 then
                    table.insert(cardsToMove, item)
                end
            end
        end
    end

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsToMove) do
        local offset = existingCount + (i - 1)
        local pos = {
            x = memPos.x + initial + offset%7 * spacing,
            y = memPos.y + 2,
            z = memPos.z
        }
        local quickPos = {
          x = (card.getPosition().x+pos.x)/2,
          y = (card.getPosition().y+pos.y+40)/2,
          z = (card.getPosition().z+pos.z)/2
        }
        card.setPosition(quickPos)
        card.setPositionSmooth(pos)
    end
end

function reorganizeMemory(player, value, index)
    local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
    local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)
    if not memoryZone then
        log("Memory Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    local memPos = memoryZone.getPosition()
    local memObjects = memoryZone.getObjects()
    local cardsInMemory = {}

    for _, obj in ipairs(memObjects) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" then
            table.insert(cardsInMemory, obj)
        end
    end

    local count = #cardsInMemory
    if count == 0 then return end

    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing  -- distance for 7 cards is 6 * 3.2 = 19.2
    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and -1 or 1
    local initial = (memPos.z > 0) and -9.5 or 9.5

    -- if count <= 7, use normal spacing; else shrink spacing so they all fit within the same total width
    local effectiveSpacing
    if count <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (count - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
        -- place them from left to right
        local offset = i - 1
        local finalPos = {
            x = memPos.x + initial + (offset * effectiveSpacing),
            y = memPos.y + 2,
            z = memPos.z
        }
        card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
    end
end

-- Helper: split any Deck in the zone into single cards, laid out in a line
local function splitDecksInZone(zone)
    local pos = zone.getPosition()
    for _, obj in ipairs(zone.getObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local contents = obj.getObjects() or {}
            local n        = #contents
            if n > 0 then
                local spacing = 0.6                       -- distance between cards
                local startX  = pos.x - spacing*(n-1)/2  -- center the line
                for i = 1, n do
                    local x = startX + (i-1)*spacing
                    obj.takeObject({
                        index    = 1,
                        position = { 4*x, pos.y + 2, pos.z+0.5 },
                        smooth   = false
                    })
                end
            end
            obj.destruct()
        end
    end
end

function reserveAndReorganizeMemory(player, value, index)
    -- 1) get the memory zone
    local memZone = getObjectFromGUID(playermemoryzones[player.color])
    if not memZone then
        log("Memory Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    -- 2) split any decks into cards
    splitDecksInZone(memZone)

    -- 3) wait a moment for those new cards to appear
    Wait.time(function()
        local memPos = memZone.getPosition()

        -- 4) gather all cards now in memory
        local memoryCards = {}
        for _, o in ipairs(memZone.getObjects()) do
            if o.tag == "Card" then
                table.insert(memoryCards, o)
            end
        end
        local memCount = #memoryCards

        -- 5) find face-down cards in hand
        local handZone = getObjectFromGUID(playerhandzones[player.color])
        if not handZone then
            log("Hand Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
            return
        end
        local cardsToMove = {}
        for _, c in ipairs(handZone.getObjects() or {}) do
            if c.tag == "Card" and math.abs(c.getRotation().z) > 90 then
                table.insert(cardsToMove, c)
            end
        end
        local handCount = #cardsToMove

        -- 6) compute total and reorganize existing memory
        local totalCount = memCount + handCount
        reorganizeMemoryForTotal(memoryCards, memPos, totalCount)

        -- 7) if no new cards, we’re done
        if handCount == 0 then
            return
        end

        -- 8) otherwise wait a bit more, then move the new cards in place
        Wait.time(function()
            for i, card in ipairs(cardsToMove) do
                local offset   = memCount + (i - 1)
                local finalPos = getMemoryPosition(memPos, offset, totalCount)

                -- quick mid-air reposition
                local cp = card.getPosition()
                card.setPosition({
                    x = (cp.x + finalPos.x) / 2,
                    y = (cp.y + finalPos.y + 40) / 2,
                    z = (cp.z + finalPos.z) / 2,
                })
                card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
            end
        end, 0.5)

    end, 0.2)
end


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Helper: Reorganize existing memory cards for a future total
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function reorganizeMemoryForTotal(cardsInMemory, memPos, futureTotal)
    if #cardsInMemory == 0 then return end

    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and 1 or -1

    table.sort(cardsInMemory, function(a, b)
      return a.getPosition().x*spacingSign < b.getPosition().x*spacingSign
    end)

    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local ySpacing = 0.05
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing


    local effectiveSpacing
    if futureTotal <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (futureTotal - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    -- same centered layout logic
    local startOffset = (futureTotal - 1) / 2
    local initial = memPos.x - startOffset * effectiveSpacing
    local yPos = memPos.y + 1
    local zPos = memPos.z

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
        local offset = (i - 1)
        local finalPos = {
            x = initial + offset * effectiveSpacing,
            y = yPos + offset * ySpacing,
            z = zPos
        }
        card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
    end
end

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Helper: Calculate final position for a new card offset
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function getMemoryPosition(memPos, offset, futureTotal)
    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing
    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and 1 or -1

    local effectiveSpacing
    if futureTotal <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (futureTotal - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    local startOffset = (futureTotal - 1) / 2
    local initialX = memPos.x - startOffset * effectiveSpacing
    return {
        x = initialX + offset * effectiveSpacing,
        y = memPos.y + 2,
        z = memPos.z
    }
end


function recollectMemory(player, value, index)

  local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
  local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)

  if memoryZone == nil then log("Memory Zone for player " .. player.color ..  " is nil.") return end


  if (memoryZone.getObjects()) != nil then
    for _,item in ipairs(memoryZone.getObjects()) do
      if item.tag == "Card" then
        item.deal(1,player.color)
      elseif item.tag == "Deck" then
        item.deal(99, player.color)
      end
    end
  end

end

function waitToSwitchState(obj, newState)
    if obj.getStateId() ~= -1 then
      Wait.condition(
          function()
              if not obj.isDestroyed() then
                  obj.setState(newState)
              end
          end,
          function()
              return not obj.isSmoothMoving()
          end
      )
    end
end

function getLastStateIndex(obj)
  local states = obj.getStates()
  if states ~= nil then
    return #states+1
  end
  return 1
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, obj)
    if obj.tag == "Card" then
        if obj.getStateId() == getLastStateIndex(obj) then
          if zone.getName() == "Field" then
              if not obj.isDestroyed() then
                waitToSwitchState(obj, 1)
              end
          end
        end
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, obj)
    if obj.tag == "Card" and obj.getStateId() ~= 1 then
        if zone.getName() == "MaterialDeckZone" then
            waitToSwitchState(obj, 1)
        end
    end
end

function onObjectDrop(player_color, droppedObject)
    -- First: if they dropped a Quick Actions Panel itself, ignore
    if droppedObject.getName() == "Quick Actions Panel" then
        return
    end

    -- Bottoming cards or decks
    if droppedObject.tag == "Card" or droppedObject.tag == "Deck" then
        for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
            if obj.getName() == "Quick Actions Panel" then
                if obj.getScale().x ~= 1.0 then
                    local quickBottomPosition = obj.positionToWorld({4,0,0})
                    local distance = (droppedObject.getPosition() - quickBottomPosition):magnitude()
                    if distance < 2.5 then
                        handleBottomDeck(droppedObject, player_color)
                        return
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Auto-rename decks dropped onto playmat
    if droppedObject.tag == "Deck" then
        local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
        if playmat then



            local minBound, maxBound = getBoundsOfDeckZone(player_color, "main")
            local pos = droppedObject.getPosition()
            if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then

                local name = droppedObject.getName()
                if not name:lower():find("main") then
                    droppedObject.setName(name .. "main")
                end
            end

        end
    end
end

function handleBottomDeckRemote(packet)
  handleBottomDeck(packet[1], packet[2])
end

function handleBottomDeck(droppedObject, player_color)
    local deck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
    if not deck then
        broadcastToColor("Cannot find your main deck!", player_color, {1,0,0})
        return
    end

    local deckPos = deck.getPosition()
    local liftedPos = Vector(deckPos.x, 4, deckPos.z)  -- Lift even higher

    -- Step 1: Lock and Lift the deck
    deck.setLock(true)
    deck.setPositionSmooth(liftedPos, false, true)

    Wait.time(function()
        -- Flip face-up cards face-down
        if not droppedObject.is_face_down then
            droppedObject.flip()
        end
        -- Step 2: Move dropped object under deck
        droppedObject.setPositionSmooth(Vector(deckPos.x, 2, deckPos.z), false, true)


        Wait.time(function()
            -- Step 3: Move deck back down
            deck.setPositionSmooth(deckPos, false, true)

            -- Step 4: After short delay, unlock the deck
            Wait.time(function()
                deck.setLock(false)

                -- Step 5: Correct the name afterward
                Wait.time(function()
                    local newDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
                    if newDeck then
                        local name = newDeck.getName()
                        if not name:lower():find("main") then
                            newDeck.setName(name .. "main")
                        end
                    end
                end, 0.5)

            end, 0.6)

        end, 0.5)

    end, 0.5)

end

function linkToDeckBottom(player, value, index)
  broadcastToColor("Drop cards here to send them to the bottom of your main deck!", player.color, {255,0,0})
end

function onPlayerAction(player, action, targets)
    if action == Player.Action.FlipOver then
        local fieldGUID = playerfields[player.color]
        if not fieldGUID then return end

        for _, obj in ipairs(targets) do
            if obj.tag == "Card" and obj.getStateId() ~= getLastStateIndex(obj) and math.abs(obj.getRotation().z) < 90 then
                local zones = obj.getZones() or {}
                for _, zone in ipairs(zones) do
                    if zone.guid == fieldGUID then
                        waitToSwitchState(obj, getLastStateIndex(obj))
                        break
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function onGenerateCardButtonPressed(player)
    local url = self.Browser.url

    if not url:match("^https://grand%-archive%.tools/card/") then
        log("I can only generate cards from https://grand-archive.tools/card/<slug>")
        self.Browser.url = "https://grand-archive.tools/tts_search/"
        return
    end

    local jsonUrl = url .. "/json"

    WebRequest.get(jsonUrl, function(request)
        if request.is_error then
            log(request.error)
        elseif request.response_code == 204 then
            log("No card was found for URL: " .. url)
        elseif request.response_code == 200 then
            local jsonBlob = '{"cards": {"spawn": [' ..  request.text .. ']}}'

            local cardData = JSON.decode(jsonBlob)
            
            if not cardData or not cardData.cards then
                log("Invalid JSON.")
            end

            local deckObjectData = Global.call("spawnDeckRemote", {
                json  = cardData,
                player = player
            })

        else
            log("Unknown issue retrieving card data from: " .. jsonUrl)
        end
    end)
end

local herbs = { 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 }

local herbNames = { "Blightroot", "Manaroot", "Silvershine", "Fraysia", "Razorvine", "Springleaf" }

function uiAddHerb(player, arg, id)
    addHerb(tonumber(arg), player)
end

function uiSubHerb(player, arg, id)
    subHerb(tonumber(arg), player)
end

function uiGather(player, arg, id)
    if arg == "-1" then
        gather(player)
    elseif arg == "-2" then
        reset(player)
    end
end

function onLoad(state)
    if state ~= "" then
        herbs = JSON.decode(state)
    end

    showHerbs()
end

function onSave()
    return JSON.encode(herbs)
end

function addHerb(herbNum, player)
    adjustHerb(herbNum, 1, "gather", player)
end

function subHerb(herbNum, player)
    adjustHerb(herbNum, -1, "spend", player)
end

function adjustHerb(herbNum, amount, desc, player)
    local changed = adjustHerbTotal(herbNum, amount)
    if changed then
        desc = desc .. "s"
    else
        desc = "cannot " .. desc
    end
    adjustHerbMessage(herbNum, desc, player)
    showHerb(herbNum)
end

function adjustHerbTotal(herbNum, amount)
    local changed = true
    local total = herbs[herbNum] + amount
    if total < 0 then 
        total = 0
        changed = false
    end
    herbs[herbNum] = total
    return changed
end

function adjustHerbMessage(herbNum, desc, player)
    local name = herbNames[herbNum]
    local message = player.steam_name .. " " .. desc .. " " .. name .. " [" .. herbNum .. "]"
    printToAll(message, player.color)
end

function showHerbs()
    for herbNum, count in ipairs(herbs) do
        showHerb(herbNum)
    end
end

function showHerb(herbNum)
    local id = "Herb" .. herbNum
    local value = herbs[herbNum]
    self.UI.setValue(id, value)
end

function gather(player)
    local herbNum = math.random(1, #herbs)
    addHerb(herbNum, player)
end

function reset(player)
    for herbNum, count in ipairs(herbs) do
        herbs[herbNum] = 0
    end
    local message = player.steam_name .. " resets the herb board"
    printToAll(message, player.color)
    showHerbs()
end

-- Saves core data on save triggers.
------------------------------------
function onSave()
  local data_to_save = {}
  data_to_save["cards"] = {}
  data_to_save["properties"] = {}
  data_to_save["zones"] = {}
  data_to_save["values"] = {}
  data_to_save["players"] = JSON.encode(Players)
  data_to_save["menus"] = {}

  for i,v in pairs(EncodedObjects) do
    --Removing Object reference before encoding.
    EncodedObjects[i].this = getObjectFromGUID(i)
    if EncodedObjects[i].this ~= nil then
      local tempThis = EncodedObjects[i].this
      EncodedObjects[i].this = ""
      data_to_save["cards"][i] = JSON.encode(EncodedObjects[i])
      EncodedObjects[i].this = tempThis
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(Zones) do
    if Zones[i].funcOwner ~= nil then
      local tempThis = Zones[i].funcOwner
      Zones[i].funcOwner = Zones[i].funcOwner.getGUID()
      data_to_save["zones"][i] = JSON.encode(Zones[i])
      Zones[i].funcOwner = tempThis
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(Properties) do
    --Removing Object reference before encoding.
    if Properties[i].funcOwner ~= nil then
      local tempThis = Properties[i].funcOwner
      Properties[i].funcOwner = Properties[i].funcOwner.getGUID()
      data_to_save["properties"][i] = JSON.encode(Properties[i])
      Properties[i].funcOwner = tempThis
    end
  end
  for i,v in pairs(Values) do
    local tempThis = Values[i].validate
    Values[i].validate = ''
    data_to_save["values"][i] = JSON.encode(Values[i])
    Values[i].validate = tempThis
  end
  for i,v in pairs(Menus) do
    if Menus[i].funcOwner ~= nil then
      local tempThis = Menus[i].funcOwner
      Menus[i].funcOwner = Menus[i].funcOwner.getGUID()
      data_to_save["menus"][i] = JSON.encode(Menus[i])
      Menus[i].funcOwner = tempThis
    end
  end
  saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
  return saved_data
end

-- Calls the version check for the encoder, and any modules
-- which support an update check.
function callVersionCheck()
  if CORE_VALUE.beta then
    WebRequest.get(URLS['ENCODER_BETA'],self,"versionCheck")
  else
    WebRequest.get(URLS['ENCODER'],self,"versionCheck")
  end
  for k,v in pairs(Properties) do
    u = v.funcOwner.getVar('UPDATE_URL')
    if u ~= nil then
      WebRequest.get(u,v.funcOwner,"updateModule")
    end
  end
  for k,v in pairs(Menus) do
    u = v.funcOwner.getVar('UPDATE_URL')
    if u ~= nil then
      WebRequest.get(u,v.funcOwner,"updateModule")
    end
  end
end

--Just checks if an update is available without actually updating.
function updateCheck(wr)
  wr = wr.text
  local ver = versionComp(string.match(wr,"version = '(.-)'"),version)
  if ''..ver ~= ''..version then
    -- broadcastToAll("An update has been found. Please right click the encoder and select update.")
  else
    -- broadcastToAll("No update found at this time. Carry on.")
  end
end
--The callVersionCheck callback for the encoder webrequest.
function versionCheck(wr)
  wr = wr.text
  local ver = versionComp(string.match(wr,"version = '(.-)'"),version)
  if ''..ver ~= ''..version then
    if CORE_VALUE.beta == true then
      broadcastToAll("An update has been found for the beta branch. Reloading encoder.")
    else
      broadcastToAll("An update has been found for the main branch. Reloading encoder.")
    end
    self.script_code = wr
    self.reload()
  else
    broadcastToAll("No update found at this time. Carry on.")
  end
end
--Compares two version strings of "(/d*.+)*"
--Examples: 1, 1.2, 0.1111.2, 0.0.0.0.1, 192.168.0.1
function versionComp(a,b)
  --First does the pattern only contain ([0-9]+)%.?
  --Pattern for versioning ##.##.##.##
  va = {}
  vb = {}
  for f in string.gmatch(a,'([0-9]+)%.?') do
    table.insert(va,tonumber(f))
  end
  for f in string.gmatch(b,'([0-9]+)%.?') do
    table.insert(vb,tonumber(f))
  end
  for k = 1, #va >= #vb and #va or #vb do
    if (va[k] ~= nil and va[k] or 0) > (vb[k] ~= nil and vb[k] or 0) then
      return a
    elseif (va[k] ~= nil and va[k] or 0) < (vb[k] ~= nil and vb[k] or 0) then
      return b
    end
  end
  return b
end

-- NEW- Registers each players hands as a zone for the encoder to track.
-- This is used to more reliably hide/reveal card buttons as it transitions zones.
function buildZones()
  local hands = {}
  local color = nil
  for k,v in pairs(Hands.getHands()) do
    --Hand Color
    color = v.getValue()
    --How many hands of this color have shown up. Init to 0 if nil.
    if hands[color] == nil then
      hands[color] = 0
    end
    hands[color] = hands[color]+1
    --Zone id is hand color + hand count for that color.
    id = color.."_"..hands[color]
    Zones[v.guid] = {
        name = id,
        func_enter = 'hideCardDetails',
        func_leave = 'showCardDetails',
        funcOwner = self,
        color = color}
  end
end
--Spawns in the default menu module if no menu module exists.
function getMenuModule(wr)
  local wr = wr.text
  params = {}
  params.type = "PiecePack_Crowns"
  params.position = self.getPosition()+Vector(0,1,0)
  params.rotation = self.getRotation()
  params.scale = Vector(1,1,1)*(2/3)
  params.sound = false
  params.callback_function = function(obj)
      obj.setName('Menu Module')
      obj.script_code = wr
      obj.reload()
      Wait.condition(function() obj.call("registerModule",nil) end,function() return obj.spawning end)
    end
  spawnObject(params)
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, obj)
  if Zones[zone.getGUID()] ~= nil then
    --log("Object has entered zone: "..Zones[zone.getGUID()].name)
    self.call(Zones[zone.getGUID()].func_enter,{obj})
  end
end
function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, obj)
  if Zones[zone.getGUID()] ~= nil then
    self.call(Zones[zone.getGUID()].func_leave,{obj})
  end
end
function onObjectLeaveContainer(ctr,obj)
  if EncodedObjects[obj.getGUID()] ~= nil then
    EncodedObjects[obj.getGUID()].this = getObjectFromGUID(obj.getGUID())
    if obj.use_hands == true then
      Wait.condition( function()
      Wait.condition(
        function() local hand = handCheck(obj) buildButtons(obj,hand) end,
        function() return obj == nil or obj.resting end
      ) end,
      function() return not obj.resting end)
    end
  end
end
function onObjectDestroyed(obj)
  if obj == self then
    for i,v in pairs(EncodedObjects) do
      EncodedObjects[i].this = getObjectFromGUID(i)
      v.this.clearButtons()
      v.this.setName(v.name)
      v.this.clearContextMenu()
    end
		for k,v in pairs(Player.getColors()) do
			if v ~= "Grey" then
				--UI.setAttribute(k.."MainMenu","active",false)
			end
		end
    for k,v in pairs(Zones) do
      o = getObjectFromGUID(k)
      if o ~= nil and o.type ~= "Hand" then
        o.destruct()
      end
    end
  end
end
function onObjectDropped(c,obj)
  local ver = versionComp(Global.getVar('Encoder').getVar('version'),version)
  if ver == version and mod_name == 'Encoder' or Global.getVar('Encoder') == nil then
    Global.setVar('Encoder',self)
  end
  if EncodedObjects[obj.getGUID()] ~= nil and EncodedObjects[obj.getGUID()].disable ~= true then
  if obj.use_hands == true then
    Wait.condition(
      function() if obj ~= nil then local hand = handCheck(obj) buildButtons(obj,hand) end end,
      function() return obj == nil or obj.resting end
    )
  end
  end
  if obj.getVar("pID") ~= nil then
    obj.call("registerModule")
  end
end
--Use a raycast to check if an object is resting in a hand or not.
--Currently has a problem with tables that have multiple points of
--  impact during a raycast.
function handCheck(obj)
  if obj ~= nil and obj.getLock() == false and obj.held_by_color == nil then
    for k,v in pairs(obj.getZones()) do
      if Zones[v.guid] ~= nil and v.type == "Hand" then
        --log("In hand: "..Zones[v.guid].name)
        return true
      end
    end
  end
  return false
end

-- If the encoder is deleted, make sure to cleanup.
function encodeObject(o)
  if o.getVar('noencode') == true then
    return false
  end
  if EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()] == nil and o ~= self then
    EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()] = {
    this = o,
    oName = o.getName(),
    oDesc = o.getDescription(),
    values = {},
    encoded = {},
    menus = {},
    editing = nil,
    flip = 1,
    disable = false
    }
    buildButtons(o)
    -- buildContextMenu(o)
    return true
  end
  return false
end

      style = "basic",

    }

    return true
  end
  return false
end
--Helper function for creating uniform button sizes.
function updateSize(text,font_size,max_len,x_just,y_just)
  local temp = ''..text
  local size = 0
  local depth = 0
  local old_i = 0
  local i = 0
  local fsize = font_size
  while old_i < #temp do
    i = string.find(temp,"\n",old_i)
    if i == nil then
      i = #temp
    end
    if i - old_i > size then
      size = i-old_i
    end
    old_i = i+1
    depth = depth+1
  end
  if size <= max_len then
    fsize = font_size
  else
    fsize = font_size*(max_len/size)
  end

  offset_x = x_just*(size/19+0.05)*-1--*(fsize/(150/86)))
  offset_y = 0--y_just*((depth/2*fsize)+8)
  barSize = size*((fsize/(150/83)))+20
  return barSize,fsize,offset_x,offset_y
end

--Creates the context menu option for flipping a card for registered objects.
function buildContextMenu(o)
  o.addContextMenuItem('Flip Menu',function(ply) flipMenu(o,0) end)
end

--Calls the menus/property modules createButtons funciton
--  when updating a given object.
function buildButtons(o,h)
  if h == nil then
    h = handCheck(o)
  end
  if o==nil then return end
  if EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].disable ~= true then
    o.clearButtons()
    o.clearInputs()
    if EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].editing == nil then
      for k,v in pairs(Menus) do
        if v.funcOwner ~= nil then
          if EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].menus[k] == nil then
            EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].menus[k] = {open=false,pos=0}
          end
          if v.visible_in_hand == nil then
            v.visible_in_hand = 0
          end
          if h==true and v.visible_in_hand>=1 then
            v.funcOwner.call(v.activateFunc,{obj=o})
          elseif h~=true and v.visible_in_hand<=1 then
            v.funcOwner.call(v.activateFunc,{obj=o})
          end
        else
          --log(v.funcOwner,"Missing module for menu "..k,'missing_module')
        end
      end
      for k,v in pairs(EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].encoded) do
        if v == true and Properties[k]~=nil and Properties[k].funcOwner~= nil then
          if Properties[k].visible_in_hand == nil then
            Properties[k].visible_in_hand = 0
          end
          if h==true and Properties[k].visible_in_hand>=1 then
            Properties[k].funcOwner.call("createButtons",{obj=o})
          elseif h~=true and Properties[k].visible_in_hand<=1 then
            Properties[k].funcOwner.call("createButtons",{obj=o})
          end
        end
      end
    else
      k = EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].editing
      if Properties[k]~=nil and Properties[k].funcOwner~= nil then
        Properties[k].funcOwner.call("createButtons",{obj=o})
      end
      flip = EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].flip
      temp = " X "
      barSize,fsize,offset_x,offset_y = updateSize(temp,90,90,0,0)
      ob = {
      label=temp, click_function='closeEditor', function_owner=self,
      position={(-1.1+offset_x)*flip,0.28*flip,(1.4+offset_y)}, height=100, width=barSize, font_size=fsize,
      rotation={0,0,90-90*flip}
      }
      for k,v in pairs(APIgetStyleTable()) do
        if ob[k] == nil then
          ob[k] = v
        end
      end
      o.createButton(ob)
    end
  end
end
--Safety button in the event that an api user does not add a
-- way to give back control of buttons to the encoder.
function closeEditor(o)
  if type(o) == 'String' then
    Players[o].editing = nil
  else
    EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].editing = nil
  end
  buildButtons(o)
end

--Disables encoding of a card.
function disableEncoding(o,p)
  EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].disable = true
  o.setName(EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].oName)
  local selection =Player[p].getSelectedObjects()
  if selection ~= nil then
    for k,v in pairs(selection) do
      if EncodedObjects[v.getGUID()] ~= nil and v ~= o then
        EncodedObjects[v.getGUID()].disable = true
        v.setName(EncodedObjects[v.getGUID()].oName)
        v.clearButtons()
        v.clearInputs()
        buildButtons(v)
      end
    end
  end
  o.clearButtons()
  o.clearInputs()
  buildButtons(o)
end
--Flips the menu for the front face to the backface and reverse.
function flipMenu(o,p)
  local flip = EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].flip
  if flip ~= 1 then
    EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].flip = 1
		o.hide_when_face_down = true
  else
    EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].flip = -1
		o.hide_when_face_down = false
  end
  if type(p) == "string" then
    local selection =Player[p].getSelectedObjects()
    if selection ~= nil then
      for k,v in pairs(selection) do
        if EncodedObjects[v.getGUID()] ~= nil and v ~= o then
          flipMenu(v,0)
        end
      end
    end
  end
  buildButtons(o)
end
--Turn target property on or off, calling the relevant Module functions.
function toggleProperty(o,p)
  if EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()] ~= nil then
    local prop = EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].encoded[p]
    if prop == nil then
      EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].encoded[p] = true
    else
      if prop ~= true then
        EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].encoded[p] = true
      else
        EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].encoded[p] = false
      end
    end
    for k,v in pairs(Properties[p].values) do
      if Values[v] ~= nil and EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].values[v] == nil then
        EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].values[v] = Values[v].default
      end
    end
    return EncodedObjects[o.getGUID()].encoded[p]
  elseif type(o) == 'String' and Players[o] ~= nil then
    local prop = Players[o].encoded[p]
    if prop == nil then
      Players[o].encoded[p] = true
    else
      if prop ~= true then
        Players[o].encoded[p] = true
      else
        Players[o].encoded[p] = false
      end
    end
    for k,v in pairs(Properties[p].values) do
      if Values[v] ~= nil and Players[o].values[v] == nil then
        Players[o].values[v] = Values[v].default
      end
    end
    return Players[o].encoded[p]
  end
end


-- Factories
function buildValueValidationFunction(p)
  v=Values[p]
  if v.validType ~= nil and v.validType ~= 'nil' then
    if string.find('stringnumberboolean',v.validType) then
      local vt = v.validType
      Values[p]['validate']= function(val,cur)
        if type(val) == vt then return val else return cur end end
    elseif string.find(v.validType, 'pattern%b()') then
      local _,_,pat = string.find(v.validType,'pattern(%b())')
      if #pat > 2 then
        pat = string.sub(pat,2,-2)
        Values[p]['validate']= function(val,cur)
        if string.find(val,pat) then return val else return cur end end
      end
    elseif string.find(v.validType, 'color') then
      Values[p]['validate']= function(val,cur)
      if val == '' or val == nil or Player[val] ~= nil then return val else return cur end end
    end
  else
    Values[p]['validate']= function(val,cur) return val end
  end
  _G[p..'Validate']= Values[p]['validate']
end

--[[register a new property.
  Takes a table
  {propID='internalname',name='Button name',values={list of values},funcOwner=obj,callOnActivate=boolean,activateFunc='function name'}
]]
function APIregisterProperty(p)
--[[propID = internal name,
  name = external name,
  values = {},  --List of Values this property calls on. DOES NOT GET REGISTERED FROM HERE.
  funcOwner = obj,
  callOnActivate = true,
  activateFunc ='callEditor',
  visible = true, --Should this property show up in the menu.
  tags = {list},--A list of tags. 'tool,property,hidden'
  xml_index = tableindex
  }]]
  Properties[p.propID] = deepcopy(p)
  log(nil,Properties[p.propID].propID.." Registered",0)
  --buildPropFunction(p.propID)
	--updateUI()
end
--Lists currently registered properties.
function APIgetPropsList(p)
  tags = {}
  if p ~= nil and p.tags ~= nil then
    for k,v in pairs(p.tags) do
      tags[k] = v
    end
  end
  data = {}
  for k,v in pairs(Properties) do
    if #tags ~= 0 then
      if v.tags == nil or v.tags == '' then
        Properties[k].tags = 'untagged'
      end
      for i=1, #tags do
        if string.find(v.tags,tags[i]) then
          if v.funcOwner == nil then
            data[k]='[Red]MISSING![White]'
          else
            data[k]=''
          end
          data[k]=data[k]..v.propID.." : "..v.name.." {"
          for m,n in pairs(v.values) do
            data[k]=data[k]..n..","
          end
          data[k]=data[k].."}"
          break;
        end
      end
    else
      if v.funcOwner == nil then
        data[k]='[Red]MISSING![White]'
      else
        data[k]=''
      end
      data[k]=data[k]..v.propID.." : "..v.name.." {"
      for m,n in pairs(v.values) do
        data[k]=data[k]..n..","
      end
      data[k]=data[k].."}"
    end
  end
  return data
end

-- Tool Functions
function deepcopy(orig)
    local orig_type = type(orig)
    local copy
    if orig_type == 'table' then
        copy = {}
        for orig_key, orig_value in next, orig, nil do
            copy[deepcopy(orig_key)] = deepcopy(orig_value)
        end
        setmetatable(copy, deepcopy(getmetatable(orig)))
    else -- number, string, boolean, etc
        copy = orig
    end
    return copy
end

function garbageCollect()
  for k,v in pairs(EncodedObjects) do
    if v.this == nil then
      if getObjectFromGUID(k) == nil then
        EncodedObjects[k] = nil
      end
    end
  end
  for k,v in pairs(Properties) do
    if v.funcOwner == nil then
      Properties[k] = nil
    end
  end
  for k,v in pairs(Zones) do
    if v.funcOwner == nil then
      Zones[k] = nil
    end
  end
  for k,v in pairs(Menus) do
    if v.funcOwner == nil then
      Menus[k] = nil
    end
  end
end

ObjectStates.Name: PiecePack_Arms
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
pID = "πGlimpse"
version = 3.14159

function onload()
  self.createButton({
    click_function='registerModule', function_owner=self, label='[i]'..pID..'[/i]', tooltip='register '..pID,
    position={0,0.1,0}, rotation={0,0,0}, scale={0.5,1,0.5},
    height=250, width=700, font_size=150,  color={0.1,0.1,0.1,1}, font_color={1,1,1,1},
  })
  Wait.condition(registerModule,function() return Global.getVar('Encoder') ~= nil and true or false end)
end

function registerModule()
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  tableGUIDs = Global.getTable('data')
  if enc ~= nil then
		properties = {
      propID = pID,
      name = "Scry Module",
      values = {},
      funcOwner = self,
      tags="tool,table_tool",
      activateFunc ='toggleProp',
      visible=false,
      visible_in_hand=2
		}
		enc.call("APIregisterProperty",properties)
  end
end

function toggleProp(obj,ply)
  enc.call("APItoggleProperty",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
  enc.call("APIrebuildButtons",{obj=obj})
end

-- disable scry buttons when leaving hand 2
 function onObjectLeaveZone(zone,obj)
   if obj==nil then return end --wtf? how can this happen? but it does
   if obj.type~="Card" then return end
   enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
   if enc then
     Zones=enc.call("APIlistZones",{})
     encZone=Zones[zone.getGUID()]
     if encZone then
       isHand2=encZone.name:find('Hand 2')
       if isHand2 then
         -- using GMnotes as a scry-zone flag (in case the object is just passing through the scry zone)
         if obj.getGMNotes()=='scryEnter' then obj.setGMNotes('') end
         -- check that the object is encoded
         if not(enc.call("APIobjectExists",{obj=obj})) then return end
         -- if encoded and scry is enabled, disable it
         if enc.call("APIobjIsPropEnabled",{obj=obj,propID=pID}) then
           enc.call("APIobjDisableProp",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
         end
       end
     end
   end
 end

function onObjectDestroy(obj)
  pcall(function()
    if obj==nil then return end --wtf? how can this happen? but it does
    enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
    if obj.type~="Card" or enc==nil then return end
    if enc.call("APIobjIsPropEnabled",{obj=obj,propID=pID}) then
      enc.call("APIobjDisableProp",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
    end
  end)
end

-- disable scry if the card lands on the table (height < 2)
function onObjectDrop(ply,obj)
  if obj==nil then return end --wtf? how can this happen? but it does
  if obj.type~="Card" then return end
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc==nil then return end
  if not(enc.call("APIobjIsPropEnabled",{obj=obj,propID=pID})) then return end

  local inHand2=false
  if obj==nil then return end
  for _,col in pairs(Player.getAvailableColors()) do
    local handObjs=Player[col].getHandObjects(2)
    for _,handObj in pairs(handObjs) do
      if obj==handObj then
        inHand2=true
      end
    end
  end
  if not inHand2 then
    enc.call("APIobjDisableProp",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
    enc.call("APIrebuildButtons",{obj=obj})
  end
end

function createButtons(t)
  card=t.obj
  if card==nil then return end

  local backpars={    -- background frame
    label='', tooltip='', click_function = 'null', function_owner = self,
    position = {0, 0, 0}, width = 500, height = 400, font_size = 250,
    scale = {1.25,1.25,1.25}, rotation = {0,0,180},
    color = {0.7,0.7,0.7}, font_color = {1, 1, 1},
  }
  local forgpars={    -- foreground button with label
    label='', tooltip='', click_function = 'null', function_owner = self,
    position = {0, 0, 0}, width = 500, height = 400, font_size = 250,
    scale = {1.2,1.2,1.2}, rotation = {0,0,0},
    color = {0.16,0.16,0.16}, font_color = {1, 1, 1, 1}, hover_color = {0.4,0.4,0.4}
  }

  local lab='▲'
  local tip='to top deck'
  local fun='move2TopLib'
  local pos={-0.4, 0.1, -3}
  forgpars.label=lab
  forgpars.tooltip=tip
  forgpars.click_function=fun
  forgpars.position=pos
  backpars.position=pos
  card.createButton(backpars)
  card.createButton(forgpars)

  local lab='▼'
  local tip='to bottom deck'
  local fun='move2BotLib'
  local pos={-0.4, 0.1, -2}
  forgpars.label=lab
  forgpars.tooltip=tip
  forgpars.click_function=fun
  forgpars.position=pos
  backpars.position=pos
  card.createButton(backpars)
  card.createButton(forgpars)

  local lab='☠'
  local tip='move to graveyard'
  local fun='move2Grav'
  local pos={-0.4, 0.1, 2}
  forgpars.label=lab
  forgpars.tooltip=tip
  forgpars.click_function=fun
  forgpars.position=pos
  backpars.position=pos
  card.createButton(backpars)
  card.createButton(forgpars)
end

function move2Lib(card, playerColor, alt)
  if not(alt) then
    move2TopLib(card,playerColor)
  else
    move2BotLib(card,playerColor)
  end
end

function move2TopLib(card, playerColor)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  enc.call("APIobjDisableProp",{obj=card,propID=pID})
  local deck = Global.call("findPlayerDeckByNameRemote", { playerColor, "main" })
  local deckPos = deck.getPosition()
  local target = {x=deckPos.x, y=deckPos.y+3, z=deckPos.z}    -- above deck
  card.clearButtons()
  card.setHiddenFrom(allBut(playerColor))
  Wait.time(function() unhide(card) end, 0.2)
  local cardRot = card.getRotation()
  cardRot.z = 180
  card.setRotationSmooth(cardRot,false,true)
  Wait.time(function() handTrigger(card) card.setPositionSmooth(target,false,true) end, 0.2)
  Wait.time(function() checkMoveSuccess(card,target,playerColor) end, 0.5)

  selected = Player[playerColor].getSelectedObjects()
  for i,obj in ipairs(shuffleList(selected)) do
    if enc.call("APIobjIsPropEnabled",{obj=obj,propID=pID}) then
      Wait.frames(function() move2TopLib(obj, playerColor) end,i)
    end
  end
  Player[playerColor].clearSelectedObjects()

end

function move2BotLib(card, playerColor)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  enc.call("APIobjDisableProp",{obj=card,propID=pID})
  local deck = Global.call("findPlayerDeckByNameRemote", { playerColor, "main" })
  local deckPos = deck.getPosition()
  local target  = {x=deckPos.x, y=1.1, z=deckPos.z}
  card.clearButtons()
  card.setHiddenFrom(allBut(playerColor))
  Wait.time(function() unhide(card) end, 0.2)
  local cardRot = card.getRotation()
  cardRot.z = 180
  card.setRotationSmooth(cardRot,false,true)
  Wait.time(function() handTrigger(card) card.setPositionSmooth(target,false,true) end, 0.2)
  Wait.time(function() checkMoveSuccess(card,target,playerColor) end, 0.5)

  selected = Player[playerColor].getSelectedObjects()
  for i,obj in ipairs(shuffleList(selected)) do
    if enc.call("APIobjIsPropEnabled",{obj=obj,propID=pID}) then
      Wait.frames(function() move2BotLib(obj, playerColor) end, i)
    end
  end
  Player[playerColor].clearSelectedObjects()
end

function move2Grav(card, playerColor)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  enc.call("APIobjDisableProp",{obj=card,propID=pID})
  local gravPos = Global.call("findPlayerZoneByNameRemote", { playerColor, "graveyard" })
  local target  = {x=gravPos.x, y=3, z=gravPos.z}
  card.clearButtons()
  local cardRot = card.getRotation()
  cardRot.z = 0
  card.setRotationSmooth(cardRot,false,true)
  Wait.time(function() handTrigger(card) card.setPositionSmooth(target,false,true) end, 0.2)
  Wait.time(function() checkMoveSuccess(card,target,playerColor) end, 0.5)

  selected = Player[playerColor].getSelectedObjects()
  for i,obj in ipairs(shuffleList(selected)) do
    if enc.call("APIobjIsPropEnabled",{obj=obj,propID=pID}) then
      Wait.frames(function() move2Grav(obj, playerColor) end, i)
    end
  end
  Player[playerColor].clearSelectedObjects()
end

function shuffleList(list)
  math.randomseed(os.time())
	for i = #list, 2, -1 do
		local j = math.random(i)
		list[i], list[j] = list[j], list[i]
	end
  return list
end

-- for hiding cards
function allBut(playerColor)
  local players = {}
  for key, color in pairs(Color.list) do
    if color ~= playerColor then
      table.insert(players,color)
    end
  end
  return players
end
function unhide(card,nframes)
  if card~=nil then
    card.setHiddenFrom({})
  end
end

-- when returning cards from the scry-zone, turn off hand-zone's pull briefly
function handTrigger(obj)
  if obj~=nil then
    obj.use_hands=false
    Wait.time(function() handOn(obj) end, 0.1)
  end
end
function handOn(obj)
  if obj~=nil then
    obj.use_hands=true
  end
end

-- check that the card made it to it's target, if not, teleport it
function checkMoveSuccess(card,targetPos,playerColor)
  if card==nil then return end   -- the card is gone, probably stacked into a deck already
  -- use hands orientation to determine which coordinate to use to check position
  -- currently only set up to work with hands rotated 0,90,180,270 degrees
  local handForw=Player[playerColor].getHandTransform(2).forward
  local posDiff = 0
  if math.abs(handForw.z)>0.5 then
    posDiff = math.abs(card.getPosition().z - targetPos.z)
  elseif math.abs(handForw.x)>0.5 then
    posDiff = math.abs(card.getPosition().x - targetPos.x)
  end
  if posDiff>1 then
    card.setPosition(targetPos)
  end
end
